PreToolUse.command:
node -e "const i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'));const t=i.toolName||'';const inp=JSON.stringify(i.toolInput||{});const isCommit=/git.*commit|run_in_terminal/.test(t)&&/git\s+commit/.test(inp);if(!isCommit)process.exit(0);console.error('
⚠️  Pre-commit gate: Before committing, run the /pre-commit-review prompt to execute Security, Performance, and UX agent scans plus the test suite.
   Run: bash scripts/install-hooks.sh (first time) to enforce this automatically.
');process.exit(0);"
PreToolUse.windows:
node -e "const i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const t=i.toolName||'';const inp=JSON.stringify(i.toolInput||{});const isCommit=/git.*commit|run_in_terminal/.test(t)&&/git\s+commit/.test(inp);if(!isCommit)process.exit(0);console.error('
⚠️  Pre-commit gate: Before committing, run the /pre-commit-review prompt to execute Security, Performance, and UX agent scans plus the test suite.
   Run: bash scripts/install-hooks.sh (first time) to enforce this automatically.
');process.exit(0);"
